socrataUrl.title: Socrata API endpoint URL
socrataUrl.description: Full Socrata SODA API endpoint. Change this to switch states. Default is New York.

sourceState.title: Source state (2-letter code)
sourceState.description: The state this actor is fetching data for. Used as the source_state value in Supabase.

dateField.title: Date field name
dateField.description: The Socrata field name to filter by date. For NY: filing_date. Check the dataset columns for other states.

entityNameField.title: Entity name field
entityNameField.description: The Socrata field name containing the business/entity name. For NY: corp_name.

entityIdField.title: Entity ID field
entityIdField.description: The Socrata field name for the unique entity identifier (used as state_filing_id). For NY: dos_id.

newEntitiesOnly.title: New entities only
newEntitiesOnly.description: If true, filters to new business formations only (Articles of Organization, Certificate of Incorporation, Application of Authority). If false, fetches all filing types including renewals and amendments.

targetDate.title: Target date
targetDate.description: Date to fetch filings for (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

supabaseServiceKey.title: Supabase service role key
supabaseServiceKey.description: Supabase service role key (not the anon key).

calibrationMode.title: Calibration mode
calibrationMode.description: Dumps the first 5 raw API records to the dataset without upserting. Use to verify field mappings for a new state.

dryRun.title: Dry run
dryRun.description: Parse and normalise but do NOT upsert to Supabase.
